hash_semantics.topology_hash: Canonical routes, execution surfaces, and observability surfaces sorted by exact object identity.
hash_semantics.topology_semantic_hash: Governance artifacts, governance inventories, and schema maps sorted canonically.
hash_semantics.topology_boundary_hash: Execution, observability, workflow mutation, and deploy mutation boundaries.
hash_semantics.topology_lineage_hash: Append-only registries, reconciliation registries, proof lineage, and topology ancestry.
hash_semantics.topology_equivalence_hash: Canonical hash over topology, semantic, boundary, lineage, containment, and traversal hashes.
